parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the chorus. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the chorus. Higher values can get into pretty warbly territory, depending on the WavShape value.
parameters-en.Predelay: Applies a bit of delay to the affected signal which at higher values, can impart a bit of ADT (Automatic Double Tracking) sound. Most evident when Mix is not maxed out or the Chorus block is on a parallel path.
parameters-en.WavShape: Selects one of seven wave shapes for the modulation.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the chorus.
parameters-en.Spread: Controls the apparent stereo width of the chorus between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
